---
title: ""
---

::: {.home-shell}
::: {.profile-sidebar}
![](images/profile/markuss-headshot.jpg){.profile-photo}

### Markuss Saule

<div class="identity-line">Data and Analytics Specialist</div>

<div class="profile-disciplines">
<div class="discipline-row"><span class="discipline-pill">Business Analytics</span><span class="discipline-pill">Statistics</span></div>
<div class="discipline-row"><span class="discipline-pill">Data Science</span></div>
</div>

I am a systems-first analytics builder focused on operational risk, bottlenecks, and decision thresholds in complex organizations.

<div class="profile-links">
<a class="btn-primary" href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/markuss-saule/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">LinkedIn</a>
<a class="btn-ghost" href="files/resume.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Resume PDF</a>
</div>

<div class="profile-meta">
<div><span>GPA</span><strong>4.0</strong></div>
<div><span>Degree</span><strong>BS Business Analytics</strong></div>
<div><span>Minors</span><strong>Statistics, Data Science</strong></div>
<div><span>Core Stack</span><strong>Python, SQL, R, Power BI</strong></div>
</div>
:::

::: {.home-main}
::: {.hero-panel .reveal}
<div class="kicker">// Decision-Grade Analytics for Complex Systems</div>

<h1 class="hero-h1"><span class="gradient-text-animated">I build </span><span class="typed-text gradient-text-animated" data-phrases='["decision engines.","risk models.","simulation labs.","analytics systems."]'></span></h1>

<p class="hero-subtitle">Business Analytics student at BYU-Idaho building high-consequence analytics for healthcare, market systems, and enterprise operations. My work is designed for environments where tradeoffs matter and decisions carry real cost.</p>

<p class="hero-personal">Healthcare is personal to me. Family health challenges shaped how I define impact, and why I care about platform-level systems that improve outcomes at scale.</p>

<div class="hero-actions">
<a class="btn-primary" href="projects.html">View Projects</a>
<a class="btn-ghost" href="resume.html">Experience Timeline</a>
</div>
:::

## <span class="gradient-text">New Flagship</span>

<div class="section-intro">OWL is the most ambitious system I've built — a full autonomous AI daemon with a knowledge graph, discovery engine, Electron desktop app, MCP server, and 5 deployment modes. Open source.</div>

::: {.flagship-panel .reveal-scale}
<img class="flagship-banner" src="images/projects/owl/cover.svg" alt="OWL knowledge graph and dashboard">
<div class="flagship-copy">
<div class="eyebrow">// Flagship build</div>

### OWL: Autonomous AI Discovery Daemon

OWL is a local-first Node.js daemon that watches your data sources — email, calendar, GitHub, Slack, Shopify — builds a living world model, and surfaces high-value discoveries when something matters. Desktop app, web dashboard, MCP server, Docker, and CLI.

It combines real-time data ingestion, LLM-powered analysis, cross-source correlation, anomaly detection, and a learning feedback loop into a single system that runs quietly on your machine with zero cloud dependencies.

<div class="flagship-stats reveal-stagger">
<div class="flagship-stat"><strong data-count="98">0</strong><span>passing tests across the full system</span></div>
<div class="flagship-stat"><strong data-count="7">0</strong><span>data source plugins with unified contract</span></div>
<div class="flagship-stat"><strong data-count="8">0</strong><span>delivery channels with rich formatting</span></div>
<div class="flagship-stat"><strong data-count="5">0</strong><span>deployment modes: CLI, Desktop, Web, Docker, MCP</span></div>
</div>

<div class="hero-actions">
<a class="btn-primary" href="projects/owl.html">Explore OWL</a>
<a class="btn-ghost" href="https://github.com/msaule/owl" target="_blank" rel="noopener">View on GitHub</a>
</div>
</div>
:::

## <span class="gradient-text">Operating Doctrine</span>

::: {.operating-grid .reveal-stagger}
<div class="op-card"><h4>Systems First</h4><p>I model the full system before choosing metrics. Local optimization without systems context is noise.</p></div>
<div class="op-card"><h4>Risk Explicitly</h4><p>I surface thresholds, failure modes, and confidence bounds so leaders can act under uncertainty.</p></div>
<div class="op-card"><h4>Bottlenecks Before Features</h4><p>I prioritize constraints that limit throughput, access, and quality before adding complexity.</p></div>
<div class="op-card"><h4>Tradeoffs Over Vanity KPIs</h4><p>I design analytics around decision consequences, not dashboard aesthetics.</p></div>
:::

## <span class="gradient-text">Selected Outcomes</span>

<div class="metric-strip reveal-stagger">
<div class="metric-pill"><strong data-count="1150" data-suffix="+">0</strong><span>Qualified applicants from optimized Meta campaigns</span></div>
<div class="metric-pill"><strong data-count="320" data-suffix="%">0</strong><span>Hiring engagement lift via KPI dashboarding</span></div>
<div class="metric-pill"><strong data-count="70" data-suffix="%">0</strong><span>Reporting time reduction via automation</span></div>
<div class="metric-pill"><strong data-count="114" data-suffix="K+">0</strong><span>SEER patient records modeled for survival analysis</span></div>
</div>

## <span class="gradient-text">Featured Projects</span>

::: {.project-grid .reveal-stagger}
<a class="project-card" href="projects/owl.html"><img class="project-thumb" src="images/projects/owl/cover.svg" alt="OWL knowledge graph"><div class="project-body"><div class="card-topline"><span class="project-badge">Flagship</span></div><div class="card-title">OWL: Autonomous AI Discovery Daemon</div><p>Local-first AI daemon with knowledge graph, discovery engine, Electron desktop app, MCP server, and 5 deployment modes.</p><div class="chips"><span class="chip">Node.js</span><span class="chip">Electron</span><span class="chip">SQLite</span><span class="chip">LLM</span></div></div></a>
<a class="project-card" href="projects/mercury-market-sim.html"><img class="project-thumb" src="images/projects/mercury-market-sim/cover.png" alt="MERCURY benchmark landscape"><div class="project-body"><div class="card-title">MERCURY: Market Microstructure Simulation Lab</div><p>Research-grade exchange simulation for liquidity stress, flash crashes, venue fragmentation, and fee-aware strategy interaction.</p><div class="chips"><span class="chip">Python</span><span class="chip">Simulation</span><span class="chip">Market Microstructure</span></div></div></a>
<a class="project-card" href="projects/fulfillment.html"><img class="project-thumb" src="images/projects/fulfillment/cover.png" alt="Fulfillment simulation visual"><div class="project-body"><div class="card-title">Fulfillment Center Risk Simulation and Staffing Optimization</div><p>SimPy-based engine with pressure scoring, risk signals, and staffing search for high-load operations.</p><div class="chips"><span class="chip">Python</span><span class="chip">SimPy</span><span class="chip">Optimization</span></div></div></a>
<a class="project-card" href="projects/blockchain-fraud.html"><img class="project-thumb" src="images/projects/blockchain-fraud/cover.png" alt="Blockchain fraud architecture"><div class="project-body"><div class="card-title">Blockchain + ML Healthcare Fraud Ledger</div><p>XGBoost fraud scoring combined with tamper-evident records for trust and auditability.</p><div class="chips"><span class="chip">XGBoost</span><span class="chip">SHA-256</span><span class="chip">Streamlit</span></div></div></a>
<a class="project-card" href="projects/insurance-fraud.html"><img class="project-thumb" src="images/projects/insurance-fraud/cover.png" alt="Insurance model performance chart"><div class="project-body"><div class="card-title">Insurance Fraud Detection</div><p>Model comparison from logistic regression to XGBoost with SHAP explainability and deployment artifacts.</p><div class="chips"><span class="chip">scikit-learn</span><span class="chip">XGBoost</span><span class="chip">SHAP</span></div></div></a>
<a class="project-card" href="projects/ai-scheduling.html"><img class="project-thumb" src="images/projects/ai-scheduling/cover.png" alt="Scheduling dashboard"><div class="project-body"><div class="card-title">AI-Powered Scheduling and Patient Access Optimization</div><p>Healthcare operations dashboard with forecasting, decomposition, and capacity visibility.</p><div class="chips"><span class="chip">Power BI</span><span class="chip">Forecasting</span><span class="chip">Healthcare Ops</span></div></div></a>
:::

<div class="center-link"><a class="btn-ghost" href="projects.html">See full project archive</a></div>
:::
:::
